title: lightwalletd gRPC client
description: Implement compact block fetching from a lightwalletd endpoint via gRPC (tonic). Support both testnet (lightwalletd.testnet.z.cash:443) and mainnet endpoints. Configurable URL. Handle reconnect on failure.
close_reason: LightwalletdClient with TLS, GetLatestBlock, GetBlockRange streaming. Proto files + tonic-build codegen. 2 unit tests verify proto types.
